name: 3DMark
notes: Manual: user should tap through to Wild Life Extreme or Solar Bay; monkey only adds supplemental input/load variation and does not guarantee an official score run.

name: Geekbench 6
notes: Manual: use -SkipMonkey when you want the official CPU/GPU benchmark flow and score capture.

name: PPSSPP
notes: Direct VIEW intent confirmed live on RG476H 2026-07-08 -- launches straight into real gameplay, no monkey/manual nav needed. Meaningful sustained load still benefits from monkey for in-game input variety.

name: RetroArch
notes: Launcher-only direct intent confirmed live on RG476H 2026-07-08 (reduces monkey randomness at app start). Direct content-open (auto-loading a specific ROM) is NOT wired here -- RetroArch's manifest exposes no ACTION_VIEW handler on this build, so opening a specific game still requires monkey/manual in-app navigation after launch.
